title: embedding status
description: Output of `sqlite-graphrag embedding status` for the pending-embeddings queue health (GAP-005, v1.0.82; backend_invoked added in v1.0.84 by ADR-0042).

backend_invoked.description: v1.0.84 (ADR-0042): backend LLM resolved for this embedding pass. One of claude, codex, or none. Omitted when no backend has been resolved yet.

coverage.description: GAP-SG-41 (v1.0.97): real persisted-vector coverage queried from the vector tables, distinct from the always-empty async `counts` queue. Always present.

memories_missing.description: v1.1.1 (P6b): active memories without a row in memory_embeddings (LEFT JOIN, so orphaned vectors never mask a gap).

entities_missing.description: v1.1.1 (P6b): entities without a row in entity_embeddings.

chunks_missing.description: v1.1.1 (P6b): memory_chunks rows without a row in chunk_embeddings.
